items.content: Call Derek about the delayed NovaTech dashboard specs - he canceled our Friday meeting again and I need those requirements to move forward with the heuristic evaluation
Mira wants to know if we should renew our lease with Phil before he raises the rent - need to check comparable apartments in Austin first
Schedule checkup with Dr. Navarro for Leo - his annual physical is overdue and he needs forms for soccer league
Hannah from Luminary finally sent feedback on wireframes - incorporate her changes and prepare for client demo next week
Coffee with Aisha tomorrow - she wanted to catch up about her new job and hear about my freelance chaos
Waiting for brand assets from Fatima at GreenLeaf - can't start the mobile prototype without their style guide and logo files
